title: Mace2x
description: Turns the mace into an exciting Hammer with different enchantment varients
body:
![   ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecc2351ac1f6b71d9abbf2abe39048adb617f79f.png)

# **_Hello this is my first Resource pack on modrith and on java edition this pack makes the mace look 3d when held_**

![new enchanted varients](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13fee1630ba6cba3b496ceabd699dfd6aec57cae.png)

And pls subscribe to my YT channel

**_NOTE THIS TEXTURE PACK DOES NOT SUPPORT THE 3D ITEM ENCHANTMENT OUTLINE RESOURCE PACK THE FOLLOWING  PHOTO MIGHT SHOW WHAT WILL HAPPEN TO YOU IF YOU HAVE IT ON(this is my friends POV Btw)_**
